discrepancy_analysis: Reported result (77 samples) and model result (77 samples) match exactly (0% relative difference), well within the +/-10% concordance threshold. Model's cohort definition (NF1 Status=='NF1') correctly identifies NF1 syndrome samples in the MOESM4 Clinical Data table. Denominator of 108 non-null Tumor_ID samples is consistent with the reported breakdown (NF1=77, Sporadic=31).
